violations.description: Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Acoustic ceiling tiles.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles in need of repair.

Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. — --Mechanical ventilation was not sufficient to keep rooms free of excessive heat, condensation, vapors, smoke, fumes or obnoxious odors. -Vent hood unable to keep up.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment,was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Hole in the back door and gap underneath the back door.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. -Vent hood over the fryers unable to keep up. Staining the walls.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Acoustic ceiling tiles in the kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles missing in the back exposing the attic.

Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. — --Mechanical ventilation was not sufficient to keep rooms free of excessive heat, condensation, vapors, smoke, fumes or obnoxious odors. -Vent hoods unable to keep up.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Hole in the back door. Gap underneath the back door.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
